roa.docketEntryComment: PROB TRANSFER TO ALAMEDA COUNTY SENT
DA'S EC1043 BRADY MOTION FOR DISCOVERY, P & A, DEC -- FILED
DA'S EC1043 BRADY MOTION (SFPD) DISCOVERY, P & A, DEC FILED

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER OUT PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO ALAMEDA COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO ALAMEDA  COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT/X:FIREARMS SAFETY & GUN SAFTEY CLASS COMPLETE/X:16 ANGER MANAGEMENT SESSIONS & 4 HOURS ANGER MANAGEMENT COURSE COMPLETE/X:COURTDEEMS ALL REQUIREMENTS OF SENTENCE COMPLETE/CONTPROB/BE/

/TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ  2D  /CTS: 2  /VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/X:DEFENDANT IS SUBJECT TO A  3 WAY   WARRANTLESS SEARCH CONDITION, ASTO DEFENDANT'S PERSON, BELONGINGS AND VEHICLE, WITH THE EXCEPTION OF HIS HOME, ANYTIME OF THE DAY OR NIGHT, WITH OR WITHOUTPROBABLE CAUSE, BY ANY PEACE, PAROLE OR PROBATION OFFICER/IND/X:THE DEFENDANT MUST PARTICIPATE IN 20 HOURS OF ANGER MANAGEMENT AND A FIREARM-SAFETY CLASS/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT FROM APD, REGARDING THE ANGER MANAGEMENT CLASSAND THE FIREARM SAFETY CLASS/X:DEFENDANTS APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF APD GENERATES-A POSITIVE REPORT/X:THE DEFENDANT SHALL NOT KNOWINGLY POSSESS ANY WEAPONS UNLESS THE WEAPON,IN THIS CASE A FIREARM, IS LAWFULLY REGISTERED TO HIM/X:THE DEFENDANT CAN ONLY POSSESS THE FIREARM AT HIS HOME, WITH THE EXCEPTION OF TRANSPORTING THE-FIREARM FROM SFPD TO HIS HOME AND TRANSPORTING THEFIREARM, IF NEEDED TO HIS FIREARM SAFETY CLASS/X:THE DEFENDANT MUST TRANSPORT THE FIREARM IN A LEGAL LOCK BOX/

/CAL:EC 1043 BRADY MOTION/NP/X:NINA SARIASLANI IS PRESENT ON BEHALF OF SANFRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT,/X:PEOPLE'S REQUEST TO JOIN MOTION IS GRANTED/X:PRODUCTION OF RECORDS FORTHWITH, RELEVANT MATERIAL LODGED WITH THE COURTTODAY WITH AND IN CAMERA REVIEW WITH THE COURT BY 04-24-19/X: FUTURE DATESCONFIRMED/

/CAL:EC 1043 BRADY MOTION/NP/X:NINA SARIASLANI IS PRESENT ON BEHALF OF SANFRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:SFPD LEGAL AND DISTRICTATTORNEY NOT SERVED    /
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTWM/987,2/WEAP/WS/CONTD:PRETRIAL/X:DAW UNLESS DISPO/
/X:ORDER FOR RETURNING OF PROPERTY FILED/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 29/TRANS 29:FORTHWITH FOR CHANGEOF PLEA/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/X:DEFENDANT ON 2 HOUR STANDBY/CONT/SB:2HR/
